findings.message: Consent flag should be set to avoid manual input. Package manager commands should include consent flags to enable non-interactive execution. Use '-n' or '--non-interactive' for gdebi, '-y' for apt/apt-get/yum/dnf, '--non-interactive' for zypper, or '--noconfirm' for pacman.
